items.title: Anker’s latest foldable 25W Qi2 Prime 3-in-1 Wireless Charging Station just hit a new all-time low for Amazon Big Spring sale
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Amazon Big Spring sale event, Anker’s official Amazon storefront is offering its Prime 3-in-1 25W Qi2.2 wireless charging station for $104.99 shipped. This is one of the latest charging units that hit the scene earlier this year carrying a $150 price tag. While we’ve seen a handful of deals for it over the last couple of months, today’s offer delivers a 30% discount to mark the steepest price drop. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this model that ships with a 5-foot Type-C cable and a 45W adapter, and it’s now going for $11 less than its previous all-time low. Head below for more details, along with deals on other Anker chargers.

This popular device usually fetches $53 at full price, which we’ve been seeing frequently discounted to this rate over 2026 in short-term lightning sales. items.summary:
As part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, REDTIGER is offering up to 44% discounts on several of its dash cams, with a standout being the more premium F17 Elite 4K 3-Channel Dash Cam down at $219.99 shipped. While it’s been carrying a $350 MSRP since hitting the market in late September, it can often be found down to at least $300 on average, with discounts having previously gone as low as this same rate, especially in short-term flash sales. Now, you can get that same 37% markdown here again for the duration of this event, letting you upgrade your vehicle with $130 slashed from the tag for the all-time lowest price we have tracked. You’ll also find various alternate options collected below, including the standard and upgrade variants to this model – all starting from $110.

items.title: This UGREEN NASync system adds up to 60TB to your workflow with remote access, now down to $176 for Amazon’s Spring sale
items.summary:
As part of the now live Amazon Big Spring Sale event, UGREEN’s Amazon storefront is offering its latest NASync DH2300 2-Bay Desktop NAS for $175.99 shipped. This model debuted toward the end of last year with a $210 price tag to join the rest of UGREEN’s NASync lineup, though it has been hovering closer to $220 in recent months. Today’s offer delivers a solid 20% markdown to knock $44 off its usual going rate. This is one of the lowest prices we have tracked for the model, which puts it within just $8 of its all-time low. The NASync DH2300 system streamlines your file management and is great for anyone who frequently runs out of storage or juggles multiple SSDs and HDDs. The timing of this deal also lines up nicely with World Backup Day, making it a great time to upgrade your storage setup.

more…
